motion.HOOK: A bold animated push into the charged opening as shapes snap into place
motion.SETUP: A dynamic pan across the animated setting, elements sliding in
motion.TURN: A punchy animated hit on the pivotal moment — the hinge swinging hard
motion.STAKES: A driving move onto the human cost, the accent colour flaring
motion.LEGACY: An animated pull-back connecting the moment to the wider world
motion.CTA: A snappy pull-back mirroring the opening, a clean shape wipe to invite a replay

brand.palette: rich saturated flats — deep teal, warm ochre-gold, oxblood and cream — with bold clean outlines and one bright pop accent; confident and graphic, high energy, never muddy or washed-out
brand.marks: graphic animation marks only — a bold shape wipe, a clean motion streak, a pop of accent is the recurring motif; NO photographic logos, NO 3D badges, NO invented lettering on banners

description: modern 2D animation — vibrant cel-shaded shapes, bold motion, animated-explainer
world: a modern 2D animated-history world — dramatic historical moments staged as vibrant cel-shaded animation (the fleet on the horizon, the crowded forum, the hand on the parchment), bold flat colour, clean outlines, dynamic staging built to MOVE
style: Modern 2D animated illustration — vibrant flat cel-shading with bold clean outlines, rich saturated period colour, simple expressive shapes, strong silhouettes and dynamic composition, a premium animated-explainer / motion-comic look. Absolutely NOT photoreal, NOT a 3D render, NOT a photograph, NOT muddy painterly realism — crisp 2D animation. Vertical 9:16 with the action in the upper two thirds and the lower third kept as clean flat colour for captions.
name: animated
